dc:title: Frontiers in Psychology Corpus (2017-2026)
dc:creator: Lakens, Daniel
dc:subject: psychology
open access
natural language processing
AI validation
text mining
dc:description: A stratified random sample of 1000 articles published in Frontiers in Psychology between 2017 and 2026, converted to metacheck paperlist objects for validation of AI and text-mining tools. Frontiers in Psychology is a fully open-access journal.

dc:provenance.sampling: 100 articles per year, stratified random sample, 2017-2026, target fully met after gap-filling resamples
dc:provenance.pdf_source: Unpaywall OA check, Europe PMC PMCID lookup, europepmc.org direct download
dc:provenance.doi_matching: Verified against CrossRef DOI used for sampling (2026-06-21)
dc:provenance.quality_audit: 60 garbled/missing GROBID-extracted DOIs corrected from verified CrossRef sample DOI, 4 missing titles backfilled from CrossRef, 0 duplicates, 0 thin-content papers, 0 slipped non-articles
